/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=address -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-tests.dir/test_json_schema.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-tests.dir/test_sse_parser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-tests.dir/test_validator.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-tests.dir/test_messages.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-tests.dir/test_cancellation.cpp.o" -o ai-sdk-tests  ../../libai-sdk-core.a ../../_deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Maind.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_json.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_container.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcrypto.dylib ../../_deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2d.a
